# opnsense_interface_neighbor (Data Source)

Reads a static ARP/NDP neighbor on OPNsense by its UUID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description.
- `ip_address` (String) IP address for the static entry.
- `mac` (String) MAC (ethernet) address.
